message:
fix: exception variable shadowing in try-except blocks

When an exception handler has `except Error as name:` and the body
modifies `name` (e.g., `name = name.lower()`), the variable gets
hoisted to `var name` at the outer scope. Previously, the codegen
still emitted `const name = @errorName(...)` inside the catch block,
causing a shadowing error.

Now checks if the exception name was hoisted and assigns to it
instead of declaring a new const.
